Internal helper: Apply unified panel theme to a ggplot

Source: R/plot_init.R
apply_panel_theme.Rd

All plot families blank panel.grid.minor and panel.grid.major.x. The VPC family additionally uses a white panel rather than theme_bw()'s grey (toggled via white_panel). This helper centralizes the panel theme application so each family picks its variant via parameters rather than re-stating an inline theme() block.

Usage

apply_panel_theme(plot, white_panel = FALSE)

Arguments

plot

A ggplot2 object.

white_panel

Logical. When TRUE, sets panel.background to a white rectangle with a thin black border. Default is FALSE. Used by the VPC family.

Value

A ggplot2 object with the unified panel theme applied.
